purpose: Define future explicit eval-planning policy after static review resolution, without running eval or reading checkpoint contents.

planning_policy.scope: Policy-only planning for one derived static-repaired direct repair row.
planning_policy.critical_boundary: This policy defines future eval-planning requirements only. It does not run model eval, read checkpoints, train, export C, benchmark, promote, or overwrite current-best.

future_eval_planning_requirements.name: new_explicit_eval_planning_branch_required
future_eval_planning_requirements.criterion: Any future eval planning must happen in a separate branch and explicitly state that checkpoint reads and model eval are not run unless later separately authorized.

future_eval_planning_requirements.name: checkpoint_identity_must_be_named_but_not_read
future_eval_planning_requirements.criterion: A future planning branch may name intended checkpoint identity/path as a string only, but must not load or inspect checkpoint contents.

future_eval_planning_requirements.name: eval_command_must_be_dry_documented_only
future_eval_planning_requirements.criterion: A future planning branch may document a proposed eval command, but must not execute it.

future_eval_planning_requirements.name: manifest_input_must_be_derived_only
future_eval_planning_requirements.criterion: The repaired row must remain derived-only unless a later explicit branch authorizes a manifest mutation.

future_eval_planning_requirements.name: quarantine_boundary_must_remain_closed
future_eval_planning_requirements.criterion: The 6 quarantine rows remain excluded and cannot be carried into eval planning.

future_eval_planning_requirements.name: promotion_path_must_remain_disabled
future_eval_planning_requirements.criterion: No promotion, current-best overwrite, C export, public benchmark, or checkpoint write is allowed by planning.
